title: Anthropic AI for Science Program
description: Anthropic's AI for Science Program provides Claude API credits to selected researchers whose high-impact scientific work can benefit from advanced AI capabilities.
eligibility: Researchers affiliated with a research institution may apply; Anthropic prioritizes scientific impact, the applicant's contributions, and the potential for AI to accelerate the proposed work.
value: Significant Claude API credits for selected scientific research projects
regions: Global, subject to program rules and service availability
